block_00: Join us at DigiMarCon in India!
block_01: Spice up your skills in New Delhi
block_02: Join us at DigiMarCon, New Delhi!
block_05: Travelling to India this time, we invite you to join us at a 2-day, jam-packed
block_08: Taking place on October 4-5, this conference is yet another opportunity for you to evolve as an affiliate, find out the latest updates in the world of marketing and walk away with new ideas and insights!
block_09: Expand your knowledge on the latest topics:
block_10: Next gen technology: Mobile Ads, MarTech, SaaS
block_12: Top keynotes, case studies, networking and more…
block_13: It’s also a wonderful opportunity to finally meet us in person! Our manager Alex will be there to talk to you tête-à-tête. Let us know if you’ll be there, book a meeting and come by for a chat and some cool merch. 😉
block_14: If you’ve never been to India, this is the perfect opportunity to combine business with pleasure.😎 Hope to see you there!
